---
title: ""
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: no
params:
  month: "february"
  zoom: 'https://uni-sydney.zoom.us/j/84164373602'
---

```{r include=F}
func = list.files("~/Documents/GitHub/ProductivityApps/shared/data/coding_functions/root/DRSN") %>% grep("\\.r", ., value=T)
for(i in 1:length(func)){
  source(paste0("~/Documents/GitHub/ProductivityApps/shared/data/coding_functions/root/DRSN/",func[i]))  
}
```
